summary: Verified CORS middleware fix (allow_origin_regex='.*') on local preview backend, plus end-to-end booking, newsletter, and service-card -> booking flows via real UI. All checks pass with zero CORS errors. User must redeploy this server.py to Render before Vercel frontend will work.
passed: OPTIONS /api/slots preflight returns 204 with access-control-allow-* headers (edge proxy on preview infra serves CORS; FastAPI fix is what matters for Render)
POST /api/bookings -> 200 confirmed booking with id/uuid + created_at
UI: nav-book-btn opens booking-dialog; 10 booking-slot-* buttons render; booked slots (10:00, 11:00) correctly greyed/disabled
UI E2E: filled name+phone, picked slot 11:00, submitted -> booking-success card appeared
UI: newsletter-email + newsletter-submit produced visible success indicator in DOM
UI: service-card-* -> service-dialog -> service-dialog-book opens booking-dialog with service preselected ('Hair')
ZERO CORS errors / pageerrors in browser console across full flow
action_items: User must redeploy /app/backend/server.py to Render so the Vercel frontend (https://beautymanntra.onrender.com origin) gets the corrected CORS middleware.
After Render redeploy, switch REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL back to the Render URL in Vercel env before production deploy.
